sqlMap.select: SELECT REGDATE, B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') AND DTIME != 0 AND B.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY B.FORMID, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# AND DTIME != '0' AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.CN , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , CASE WHEN DRAFTENDCNT > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #company# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND B.DTIME != 0 AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') ORDER BY A.CN, REGDATE, DTIME DESC

SELECT REGDATE , B.FORMID, A.FORMNAME AS FORMINFO, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) AS REGDATE, FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') AND B.FORMID = #searchID# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) ORDER BY FORMID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) REGDATE , USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND B.COMPANYID = #company# AND B.USERID = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY USERID, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT REGDATE , A.DISPLAYNAME , IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) REGDATE , DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7), DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND (REGDATE IS NOT NULL AND REGDATE <> '') AND A.CN = #searchID# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) ORDER BY CN, REGDATE, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT A.FORMID, CASE WHEN #lang# = 1 THEN B.FORMNAME ELSE B.FORMNAME2 END AS FORMINFO FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG A JOIN TBL_FORMINFO B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate#
(DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR SUSININGCNT != 0 OR SUSINENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0)
(DRAFTTIME != 0)
A.FORMNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchList#, '%')
GROUP BY A.FORMID, B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2 ORDER BY B.FORMNAME, B.FORMNAME2

SELECT B.FORMID, IF (#lang# LIKE '1', A.FORMNAME , A.FORMNAME2) AS FORMINFO, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) AS DRAFTCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) AS DRAFTINGCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) AS DRAFTENDCNT, IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) AS RETURNCNT, IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) AS DRAFTEND, CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END AS DTIME FROM TBL_FORMINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT FORMID, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) AS DRAFTCNT, SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) AS DRAFTINGCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) AS DRAFTENDCNT, SUM(RETURNCNT) AS RETURNCNT, SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) AS DRAFTEND, SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) AS DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FORMID = B.FORMID INNER JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.FORMCONTID = C.FORMCONTID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #company# AND (DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0) AND A.FORMID = #searchID# ORDER BY FORMID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT IF (#lang# LIKE '1', A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2) AS DISPLAYNAME, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DEPTID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY DEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DEPTID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND ( DRAFTCNT != 0 OR DRAFTINGCNT != 0 OR DRAFTENDCNT != 0 OR RETURNCNT != 0 ) AND B.DEPTID = #searchID# ORDER BY CN, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT IF (#lang# LIKE '1', A.DISPLAYNAME , A.DISPLAYNAME2) AS DISPLAYNAME, IFNULL(DRAFTCNT, 0) DRAFTCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTINGCNT, 0) DRAFTINGCNT , IFNULL(DRAFTENDCNT, 0) DRAFTENDCNT , IFNULL(RETURNCNT, 0) RETURNCNT , A.CN , IFNULL(DRAFTEND, 0) DRAFTEND , CASE WHEN DRAFTEND > 0 THEN ROUND((DTIME / DRAFTENDCNT / 86400), 2) ELSE 0 END DTIME FROM TBL_USERMASTER A JOIN ( SELECT USERID , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT) DRAFTEND , SUM(DRAFTTIME * DRAFTENDCNT) DTIME, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# GROUP BY USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) B ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND B.USERID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #company# AND ( DRAFTCNT != '0' OR DRAFTINGCNT != '0' OR DRAFTENDCNT != '0' OR RETURNCNT != '0' ) AND B.USERID = #searchID# ORDER BY USERID, DRAFTCNT DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7) REGDATE , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + DRAFTENDCNT + RETURNCNT) DRAFTCNT , SUM(DRAFTINGCNT + SUSININGCNT) DRAFTINGCNT , SUM(DRAFTENDCNT + SUSINENDCNT) DRAFTENDCNT , SUM(RETURNCNT) RETURNCNT FROM TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG B JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER A ON B.TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND B.COMPANYID = A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AND B.DeptID = A.CN WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# AND REGDATE >= #startDate# AND REGDATE <= #endDate# AND A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #company# GROUP BY SUBSTR(REGDATE, 1, 7)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'DAY' DAY , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , DATE_FORMAT(date_add(CONNECTTIME,interval+#offSet# hour), '%H') DATE , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(CONNECTTIME, '%H')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'TOTAL' TOTAL , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , DATE_FORMAT(date_add(CONNECTTIME,interval+#offSet# hour), '%H') DATE , 0 FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(date_add(CONNECTTIME,interval+#offSet# hour), '%H') ) A ORDER BY A.DATE, A.DAY

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , CONNECTBROWSER , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY CONNECTBROWSER ORDER BY COUNT(SEQUENCE) DESC

SELECT 'OS' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , CONNECTOS , ( SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY CONNECTOS
UNION ALL
SELECT 'BIT' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , '64BIT' CONNECTOS , 0 TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTAGENT regexp 'WOW64|Win64|Mac' AND CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UNION ALL
SELECT 'BIT' TYPE , COUNT(SEQUENCE) CONNECTCNT , 'OTHERS' CONNECTOS , 0 TOTAL FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE CONNECTAGENT NOT regexp 'WOW64|Win64|Mac' AND CONNECTTIME >= #startDate# AND CONNECTTIME < #endDate# AND COMPANYID = #company# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TYPE DESC, CONNECTCNT DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, USERID, USERNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #today# , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , CN , DISPLAYNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , TBA.TENANT_ID , TBA.COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , TENANT_ID , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_USERMASTER ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB2.WRITERIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , AVG(time_to_sec(timediff(str_to_date(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')))) DENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , AVG(time_to_sec(timediff(str_to_date(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')))) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC2.WRITERIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDC , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDC , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBD.WRITERIDC ) AA )

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMCONTID, FORMCONTNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) ( SELECT #today# , FORMID , FORMNAME , FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , TBA.TENANT_ID , TBA.COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT A.FORMCONTID FORMCONTID , B.FORMCONTNAME FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , A.TENANT_ID , A.COMPANYID FROM TBL_FORMINFO A JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.FORMCONTID = B.FORMCONTID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID ) TBA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB2.FORMIDA LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , AVG(time_to_sec(timediff(str_to_date(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')))) DENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , AVG(time_to_sec(timediff(str_to_date(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')))) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC2.FORMIDB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL AND STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE < #endDate# GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBD.FORMIDA ) AA )

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYDOCCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, DEPTID, DEPTNAME, USERID, USERNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID )
(SELECT TODAY , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , CN , DISPLAYNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT
CN , DISPLAYNAME , DESCRIPTION , DEPARTMENT , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID ,
TODAY FROM
(
select TBA.CN, TSB.DISPLAYNAME, TSB.DESCRIPTION, TBA.DEPARTMENT, TBA.TENANT_ID, TBA.COMPANYID, DINGCNT , SINGCNT , DENDCNT , SENDCNT , DENDTIME , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TBA.TODAY
from (SELECT TAS.CN,
TAS.DEPARTMENT, TAS.TENANT_ID, TAS.COMPANYID, TAS.TODAY FROM (SELECT WRITERID CN,
WRITERDEPTID DEPARTMENT, TENANT_ID TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') TODAY FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE STARTDATE is not null AND WRITERID is not null AND WRITERDEPTID is not null
UNION SELECT WRITERID,
WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') TODAY
FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE ENDDATE is not null AND WRITERID is not null AND WRITERDEPTID is not null
) TAS
GROUP BY CN, DEPARTMENT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY
) TBA
JOIN
TBL_USERMASTER TSB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSB.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND TBA.CN = TSB.CN
LEFT JOIN
( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA ,
IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB.WRITERIDA AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBB.WRITERDEPTIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDA , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDA2 , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBB2.WRITERIDA AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBB2.WRITERDEPTIDA2 AND TBA.TODAY = TBB2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, STARTDATE, ENDDATE)) DENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001'
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC.WRITERIDB AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBC.WRITERDEPTIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDB , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDB2 , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, STARTDATE, ENDDATE)) SENDTIME, TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011'
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBC2.WRITERIDB AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBC2.WRITERDEPTIDB2 AND TBA.TODAY = TBC2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT WRITERID WRITERIDC , WRITERDEPTID WRITERDEPTIDC , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WRITERID, WRITERDEPTID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.CN = TBD.WRITERIDC AND TBA.DEPARTMENT = TBD.WRITERDEPTIDC AND TBA.TODAY = TBD.NOWDATE ) AA) asd)

INSERT INTO TBL_DAILYFORMCOUNTLOG ( REGDATE, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMCONTID, FORMCONTNAME, DRAFTINGCNT, DRAFTENDCNT, DRAFTTIME, SUSININGCNT, SUSINENDCNT, SUSINTIME, RETURNCNT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID )
(SELECT TODAY , FORMID , FORMNAME , FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , DINGCNT , DENDCNT , DENDTIME , SINGCNT , SENDCNT , SENDTIME , RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID FROM ( SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME , FORMID , FORMNAME , IFNULL(DINGCNT, 0) DINGCNT , IFNULL(SINGCNT, 0) SINGCNT , IFNULL(DENDCNT, 0) DENDCNT , IFNULL(SENDCNT, 0) SENDCNT , IFNULL(RETUNCNT, 0) RETUNCNT , IFNULL(DENDTIME, 0) DENDTIME , IFNULL(SENDTIME, 0) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , TODAY FROM ( SELECT TSC.FORMCONTID, TBA.FORMID, TSB.FORMNAME, TSC.FORMCONTNAME, TBA.TENANT_ID, TBA.COMPANYID, TBA.TODAY, DINGCNT , SINGCNT , DENDCNT , SENDCNT , RETUNCNT , DENDTIME , SENDTIME FROM ( SELECT FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY FROM (SELECT
FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') TODAY FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE STARTDATE is not null AND FORMID is not null
UNION SELECT
FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') TODAY
FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE ENDDATE is not null AND FORMID is not null
)AA GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, TODAY ) TBA
JOIN TBL_FORMINFO TSB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TSB.FORMID
JOIN TBL_FORMCONTAINER TSC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TSC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TSC.COMPANYID AND TSB.FORMCONTID = TSC.FORMCONTID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBB ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB.NOWDATE
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SINGCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBB2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBB2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBB2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBB2.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBB2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) DENDCNT , AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, STARTDATE, ENDDATE)) DENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '001' GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBC ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC.FORMIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDB , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) SENDCNT , AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, STARTDATE, ENDDATE)) SENDTIME , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(ENDDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBC2 ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBC2.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBC2.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBC2.FORMIDB AND TBA.TODAY = TBC2.NOWDATE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT FORMID FORMIDA , IFNULL(COUNT(*) , 0) RETUNCNT , TENANT_ID , COMPANYID , DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') NOWDATE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO WHERE FUNCTIONTYPE = '004' AND STARTDATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FORMID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID, DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE, '%Y-%m-%d')) TBD ON TBA.TENANT_ID = TBD.TENANT_ID AND TBA.COMPANYID = TBD.COMPANYID AND TBA.FORMID = TBD.FORMIDA AND TBA.TODAY = TBD.NOWDATE) AA) asd)

INSERT INTO TBL_YEARLYDOCCOUNT (DOC_COUNT, MONTH_TYPE, DOC_TYPE, CREATE_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END as MONTH_TYPE, 'OUTRECEIVE' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND FORMID = '9999999999' AND DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y%m') >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -11 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(A.DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END as MONTH_TYPE, 'OUTSEND' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A INNER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO R on A.DOCID = R.DOCID WHERE R.RECEIPTPOINTID NOT LIKE 'ADDRESS%' AND R.EXTRECEPTYN = 'Y' AND R.PROCESSYN IN ('A', 'E', 'H', 'I', 'R', 'S', 'T', 'V', 'Y') AND DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y%m') >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -11 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(DOCID) AS DOC_COUNT, CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END as MONTH_TYPE, 'INSEND' AS DOC_TYPE, 'masteradmin' AS CREATE_ID, 0 AS TENANT_ID, 'Top' AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE FORMID NOT IN ( SELECT FORMID FROM tbl_forminfo WHERE FORMNAME NOT IN ( '기안(원외)', '기안(유통원외)', '감사(원외)', '감사(유통원외)', '서면결의서', '회의록' ) ) AND DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y%m') >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(now(), INTERVAL -11 MONTH), '%Y%m') GROUP BY CASE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%Y') WHEN DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y') THEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') ELSE DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ENDDATE, INTERVAL 9 HOUR), '%c') -12 END
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOC_COUNT, DOC_TYPE, MONTH_TYPE FROM TBL_YEARLYDOCCOUNT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_USER (USER_ID, IPADDRESS, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (IFNULL(#userId#, #ip#), #ip#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #year#, #month#, #day#, #hour#, #timeCode#, #menuId#, #code#, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STAT_COUNT = STAT_COUNT + 1

INSERT INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_USER_MONTH (USER_ID, IPADDRESS, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (IFNULL(#userId#, #ip#), #ip#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #year#, #month#, FLOOR(#timeCode# / 10000), #menuId#, #code#, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STAT_COUNT = STAT_COUNT + 1
sqlMap.select:
SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER_MONTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID AS menuId, SUM(STAT_COUNT) AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_USER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT (DEPT_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (#deptId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #year#, #month#, #day#, #hour#, #timeCode#, #menuId#, #code#, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STAT_COUNT = STAT_COUNT + 1

INSERT INTO TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT_MONTH (DEPT_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, YEAR, MONTH, TIME_CODE, MENU_ID, CODE, STAT_COUNT) VALUES (#deptId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #year#, #month#, FLOOR(#timeCode# / 10000), #menuId#, #code#, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STAT_COUNT = STAT_COUNT + 1
sqlMap.select:
SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, MENU_ID AS menuId, STAT_COUNT AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT_MONTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
ORDER BY TIME_CODE, MENU_ID

SELECT YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID AS menuId, SUM(STAT_COUNT) AS statCount FROM TBL_STAT_MENU_DEPT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND TIME_CODE >= #startTime# AND TIME_CODE <= #endTime#
GROUP BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID ORDER BY YEAR, MONTH, DAY, MENU_ID
